title: Smoky Fluffy Spanish Paneer Paella
description: A vibrant, smoky paella packed with fluffy rice, paneer cubes, and Mediterranean flavors, energizing and vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a wide paella pan or skillet over medium‑high heat.
Add the diced onion, minced garlic, and diced red bell pepper; sauté for 3–4 minutes until softened.
Stir in the smoked paprika and cumin, cooking for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the rice, tossing to coat it with the spices; cook for 2 minutes.
Pour in the vegetable broth, bring to a simmer, season with salt and pepper, then reduce heat to medium‑low.
Simmer uncovered for 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Gently fold in the paneer cubes and cherry tomatoes, cover, and continue to simmer for another 8–10 minutes until the rice is tender and liquid absorbed.
While the rice cooks, zest the lemon and squeeze the fresh lemon juice into a small bowl.
Once the rice is cooked, remove from heat, drizzle with lemon zest and juice, and stir gently.
Cover with a clean kitchen towel and let rest for 5 minutes to allow the rice to become fluffy.
Fluff the rice with a fork, taste, and adjust seasoning if needed.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley before serving.
